prompt: A user just said: 'Topic001 是什么？' The knowledge base is at /tmp/knowledge-test/ with a large domain TestLarge (250+ wiki pages, index.md has 1000+ lines). Follow the query skill to answer. Save step-by-step log to transcript.md and final answer to answer.md.
assertions: The agent detected large scale (either by reading long index.md or checking page count)
The agent ran qmd update before searching
The agent ran qmd search (BM25) as the first search method
The agent found and read the Topic001 wiki page
The agent did NOT run qmd embed (BM25 results should be sufficient for 'Topic001')
